---
title: "Replication Draft: Branas et al. (2011) Greening Vacant Lots"
format: html
author: "Jay Kim, William Lien, Ava Robillard"
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(fixest)        # fast DID/event-study style regressions
library(lme4)          # mixed effects
library(clubSandwich)  # cluster-robust SE for lmer models
library(modelsummary)  # nice tables
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
df <- read_csv(here("data", "branas2011_simulated_panel.csv"))

df <- df %>%
  mutate(section = factor(section),
         year = as.integer(year),
         lot_id = factor(lot_id),
         contig_group_id = factor(contig_group_id),
         matched_set_id = factor(matched_set_id),
         treated = as.integer(treated),
         post = as.integer(post),
         treated_status = as.integer(treated_status),
         did = post * treated_status)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
n_obs <- nrow(df)
n_lots <- n_distinct(df$lot_id)
years <- range(df$year)
sections <- levels(df$section)

list(n_obs=n_obs, n_lots=n_lots, years=years, sections=sections)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
# Pre-period only
pre_df <- df %>% filter(post == 0)

# Collapse to lot-level pre means (so each lot counts once)
pre_lot <- pre_df %>%
  group_by(lot_id, treated, section) %>%
  summarise(
    area_sqft = mean(area_sqft, na.rm=TRUE),
    median_age = mean(median_age, na.rm=TRUE),
    unemployed_sqmi = mean(unemployed_sqmi, na.rm=TRUE),
    college_sqmi = mean(college_sqmi, na.rm=TRUE),
    income_sqmi = mean(income_sqmi, na.rm=TRUE),
    black_sqmi = mean(black_sqmi, na.rm=TRUE),
    hispanic_sqmi = mean(hispanic_sqmi, na.rm=TRUE),
    poverty_sqmi = mean(poverty_sqmi, na.rm=TRUE),
    vacant_lot_density = mean(vacant_lot_density, na.rm=TRUE),
    .groups="drop"
  )

# Quick compare treated vs control within section
pre_lot %>%
  group_by(section, treated) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), median, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
covars <- c("area_sqft","vacant_lot_density","median_age","unemployed_sqmi",
            "college_sqmi","income_sqmi","black_sqmi","hispanic_sqmi","poverty_sqmi")

# Pre-period means for covariates (paper restricts covariates to baseline/pre variation)
lot_cov_pre <- df %>%
  filter(post == 0) %>%
  group_by(lot_id) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(covars), ~mean(.x, na.rm=TRUE), .names="pre_{.col}"),
            .groups="drop")

# Pre-period mean outcome (Mi) for a specific outcome (repeat per outcome you model)
make_analysis_df <- function(outcome){
  mi <- df %>%
    filter(post == 0) %>%
    group_by(lot_id) %>%
    summarise(Mi = mean(.data[[outcome]], na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")

  df %>%
    left_join(lot_cov_pre, by="lot_id") %>%
    left_join(mi, by="lot_id")
}
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
analysis <- make_analysis_df("crime_gun_assaults")

# Fixed effects: section-by-year
analysis <- analysis %>%
  mutate(section_year = interaction(section, year, drop=TRUE))

m1 <- lmer(
  crime_gun_assaults ~ post + treated + did +
    section_year +
    section:Mi +
    pre_area_sqft + pre_vacant_lot_density + pre_median_age + pre_unemployed_sqmi +
    pre_college_sqmi + pre_income_sqmi + pre_black_sqmi + pre_hispanic_sqmi + pre_poverty_sqmi +
    (1 | contig_group_id),
  data = analysis
)

# Cluster-robust SE at contiguous-lot group (proxy for paper)
m1_vcov <- vcovCR(m1, cluster = analysis$contig_group_id, type="CR2")
coef_test(m1, vcov = m1_vcov) %>% as.data.frame()
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
event_df <- df %>%
  mutate(rel_year = year - greening_year) %>%
  filter(rel_year >= -5, rel_year <= 5)

# Use fixest for convenient event-study; include section-by-year FE
es <- feols(
  crime_gun_assaults ~ i(rel_year, treated_status, ref = -1) | section^year,
  data = event_df,
  cluster = ~contig_group_id
)

iplot(es, xlab = "Years relative to greening", 
      main = "Event study: gun assaults")
```

```{r}
df_clean %>%
  group_by(year, treated_status) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_gun_assaults = mean(crime_gun_assaults, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = mean_gun_assaults, color = factor(treated_status))) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Gun Assaults Over Time: Treated vs Control Lots",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Average Gun Assaults",
    color = "Treated"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
df_clean %>%
  filter(post == 0) %>%
  group_by(year, treated_status) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_gun_assaults = mean(crime_gun_assaults, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = mean_gun_assaults, color = factor(treated_status))) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Pre-Treatment Trends in Gun Assaults",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Average Gun Assaults",
    color = "Treated") +
  theme_minimal()
```
